terminal.closeTabConfirm: Close this tab and disconnect the session?
terminal.closeAllTabsConfirm: Close all {{count}} tab(s) and disconnect their sessions?

hostVerify.title: Verify Host Key
hostVerify.authenticity: The authenticity of host <1>{{host}}:{{port}}</1> cannot be established.
hostVerify.confirmConnect: Are you sure you want to continue connecting?

settings.title: Settings
settings.closeOnDisconnectHint: When enabled, terminal tabs are automatically closed when the session ends. When disabled, the tab stays open showing the disconnected state.
settings.openLocalOnStartupHint: When enabled, a local terminal tab is automatically opened when the application starts. When disabled, the application starts with no open tabs.
settings.confirmOnCloseTabHint: When enabled, a confirmation dialog is shown before closing a terminal tab. When disabled, tabs close immediately.
settings.confirmOnQuitLabel: Confirm before quitting with open sessions
settings.autoRefreshHint: Periodically reload folders and sessions from the database. Useful when multiple clients share a PostgreSQL backend. Set to Off to disable.
settings.confirmOnQuitHint: When enabled, a confirmation dialog is shown before quitting if there are open terminal tabs. When disabled, the application closes immediately on Ctrl+Q / Cmd+Q regardless of open sessions.
settings.quitConfirmMessage: There are {{count}} open session(s). Are you sure you want to quit?
settings.fontSizeHint: Use Ctrl+Plus / Ctrl+Minus in an active terminal to zoom in/out. Ctrl+0 resets to default (14).
settings.copyOnSelectHint: When enabled, selected text is automatically copied to the clipboard (PuTTY-style). When disabled, use Ctrl+Shift+C to copy.
settings.pasteOnRightClickHint: When enabled, right-clicking in the terminal pastes clipboard content (PuTTY-style).
settings.dbSqlitePathHint: Path to the SQLite database file. Leave empty to use the default location. Changing this requires a restart.
settings.dbTestDbNotFound: Server reachable and credentials valid, but the database does not exist yet. Use "Create Database" to create it.
settings.dbRestartRequired: Application restart required for changes to take effect.
settings.dbCredentialNote: Credentials are always stored locally per user, never in the central database.
settings.dbFallbackBanner: Could not connect to PostgreSQL: {{message}}. Using offline mode.
settings.restrictPrivateIpsHint: When enabled, SSH connections to loopback (127.x), link-local, and private RFC 1918 addresses (10.x, 172.16-31.x, 192.168.x) are blocked. Disable this if you connect to hosts on your local network or homelab.
